subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have given glad tidings unto all humanity of that which the Most Great and Blessed Verse hath concluded: "And yet He is the Messenger of God and the Seal" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا بشرنا الوری بما انتهت الایه المبارکه الکبری ولکنه رسول الله و خاتم
subcodes.subjects: @Seal of the Prophets, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @day of Resurrection; Judgement
